results.name: photograph (medium)
results.description: Art made by taking  a photograph of a physical object.

results.name: phyrexia
results.description: The original plane of Phyrexia. Not to be confused with New Phyrexia, aka Mirrodin.

results.name: phyrexianized
results.description: Things and people that weren't originally phyrexian that have become phyrexian

results.name: phyrexian mana ability
results.description: Cards whose activated abilities cost phyrexian mana

results.name: phyrexian mana cost
results.description: Cards where the casting cost includes phyrexian mana

results.name: phyrexian negator
results.description: The creature that appears on the Phyrexian Negator card.

results.name: phyrexian newt
results.description: Manufactured androgynous life forms as part of the old Phyrexian empire. No relation to normal earth newts.

results.name: phyrexian omenpath
results.description: Omenpaths created during the New Phyrexian Invasion of the Multiverse due to Realmbreaker.

results.name: phyrexian symbol
results.description: ϕ

results.name: phyrexian symbol omen
results.description: Before the Phyrexian invasion of the multiverse, the Phyrexian Symbol started to (un)naturally occur in all sorts of places.

results.name: phyrexian token
results.description: These tokens had Phyrexian variants added in Modern Horizons 2 errata.

results.name: physical disability
results.description: Not all disabilities are visible, but these may be.

results.name: pia nalaar
results.description: Chandra's mother

results.name: piandao
results.description: A master swordsman who teaches Sokka the art of the blade during the episode "Sokka's Master"

results.name: piece of eden
results.description: Powerful Isu artifacts from the Assassin's Creed series.

results.name: pierce
results.description: Cards whose excess damage is dealt to their target's controller instead.

results.name: pigtails
results.description: Two bunches of hair gathered and fastened on either side of the head, in braids or hanging freely.

results.name: piko piko hammer
results.description: Amy Rose's giant hammer.

results.name: pile
results.description: Effects that make you put things in a pile for selection/grouping purposes

results.description: A "put things here" card.

results.name: pilgrim of the fires
results.description: A golem that showed up in all three ages of Tarkir.

results.name: pillage effect
results.description: Cards that loot/rummage and create Treasure(s).

results.name: pillowfort
results.description: Cards that disincentivise or make it harder for opponents to attack you

results.name: pinchy mcstingbutt
results.description: The scorpion that used to appear on the Hour of Devastation battlefield during the Magic Arena beta. Yes, that's its real official name.

results.name: pinger
results.description: Effects that deal just 1-2 damage repeatedly.
